title: Web search results display component for agent chat
purpose: Renders web search tool call results in a structured format with query, results list, and error handling.

steps.content: Extract the input query from the tool call item.
Parse and normalize the raw output into a results array.
Render the query as a code block if present.
IF results exist, display them in a list with title, URL, and snippet.
IF an error exists on the tool call, display it in red text.
